movie: Bad Times at the El Royale (2018)

thread.content:
Wrapping up our tour of 2018 candidates, we now screen “Bad Times at the El Royale”—prepare for fun in the sun, some chills and spills, and more 

Follow us on the hashtag #BTATER18

#goodtimes #timeofourroyales #elmovie
Hello this is Hervey Okkles, I'll be commenting on this film today #BTATER18
Hello this is Alan and I'll be commenting on this film. #BTATER18
A leisurely introductory sequence at this motel #BTATER18
We've been shown the gun in Act One. #BTATER18
A motel renovation movie #BTATER18
Who needs a shower in your motel room when you can just step outside? #BTATER18
We got our first chill and spill #BTATER18
The film has started with a BANG. #BTATER18

Enter Cynthia Erivo with a pretty impressive poncho of sorts

I guess this is a period piece, I wasn't exactly sure if it was in the past or just kinda retro in tone #BTATER18
So much talk about state lines, and what it feels like to cross state lines: shades of "Convoy" (1978) #BTATER18
Wow, beautiful lobby. I like that the slot machines are only on the Nevada side, but the jukebox is evenly divided in the middle. #BTATER18
Flynn! Jeff Bridges with the Tron reference. #BTATER18

Beautiful automat nook 

We're now getting a huge El Royale lore dump #BTATER18
Jon Hamm doing a great job effortlessly carrying three coffee cups while serving coffee from a large carafe. #HospitalitySkillz #BTATER18
This is a very leisurely check-in process #BTATER18
Map drop #BTATER18
Great sense of place, great detail. Lots of promise here. #BTATER18
Bridges the pastor seemed to pick from a large number of rooms with a single coin flip, curious about his process here #BTATER18
I certainly enjoy the density of logistics so far #BTATER18 bsky.app/profile/this...
Everybody laboriously paying their $0.25 for the coffees that Jon Hamm served is just wonderful. #BTATER18
This movie is much more about the minutiae of etiquette than I would have guessed #BTATER18
One weird aspect of the film: for the care in midcentury lettering, etc, in the set/prop design, it's odd how the film title cards don't attempt anything of the sort #BTATER18
If you like looking at nice luggage, this is your film. #BTATER18
20 minutes in, we're getting twist and turns, an Earful challenge for analysis imo #BTATER18
Impressive work to keep this phone operating while stripping it of all its capacitors. #BTATER18
Wow, this place is full of circuitry doo-dads, very concerning #BTATER18
Jon Hamm is a master electrician AND lockpicker. #BTATER18
He is facing a fairly empty motel and fairly lax security, his investigation couldn't be going better #BTATER18
Hell yes, this is great motel design #BTATER18

Nice to hear Erivo seeing actually-good music for once

(Generally great uncanny vibes in this sequence) #BTATER18
Very dense amount of suspicious activity and/or singing practice happening in this hotel. #BTATER18
We have made our way through a rather leisurely flashback, now onto Room 5 #BTATER18
Hell yes, back to the lounge! #BTATER18
Devious architecture in this hotel: the panopticon corridor has perfect soundproofing, but each room has tissue walls from one to the next #BTATER18
Father Flynn is showing cracks #BTATER18
Drink of the ep is a top-shelf Cognac "toddy". #BTATER18
Father Flynn has forgotten everything except where the secret hole is under the carpet in the El Royale. #BTATER18
Wow, this jukebox has pretty impressive sequencing/auto-play capabilities #BTATER18
Sinister drink of the ep #BTATER18
The El Royale really invites this sort of federal oversight, given its interstate nature #BTATER18
Washington D.C. is effectively just another room at The El Royale #BTATER18
It's Jesus on the beach. #TwoSetsOfFootsteps #BTATER18
Rose is safe and okay #BTATER18
Is 'clear' a scientology reference? Really quite a density of dueling religions if so #BTATER18
Agent Hamm violating the prime directive, very concerning #BTATER18
This movie continued with a BANG. #BTATER18
More chills and spills #BTATER18
High hit rate given the small platter space in this jukebox #BTATER18
Miles the bellboy/bartender very disrespectful to the Father, he really needs that drink #BTATER18
Father Flynn is having a rough evening. #BTATER18
Not a great Confession #BTATER18
The confession has gotten much more detailed. #BTATER18
Father Flynn much less prone to distraction than Agent Hamm #BTATER18
Beautiful showcase of soundproofing #BTATER18
More spills (spillover, you might call it) #BTATER18
We have added another six or seven minutes of coverage to the main event of the El Royale, but not a lot of new information/etc so far #BTATER18
The spark plugs have returned! #SparkItUp #BTATER18
Father Flynn is very good at getting information out of people #BTATER18
We have appeared to have cleared up the main mysteries of this zany motel (or have we??), let's see how these kooks get out of this pickle #BTATER18
This movie is such a beautiful showcase of California geography #BTATER18
Stockton shout-out! #BTATER18
Wow, we get total closure on the coin flip #BTATER18
We return to the lobby, damn these firepits are sick #BTATER18
Rose is doing a good job rearranging the furniture in the background. #BTATER18
Another big etiquette faux pas, this time from Rose #BTATER18
Erivo is rapidly progressing towards her current bald state #BTATER18
Nice atmosphere and dynamic to this whole cat-and-mouse surveillance/extermination gambit, fun stuff #BTATER18
The red bag! #FoundTheBag #BTATER18
FIREPITS ARE GO #BTATER18
Jesus is back! #BTATER18
VERY impressive bonfire here at the cult compound. #BTATER18
Really nice atmosphere in the lead-up to that "Billy Lee" title card drop, we've hit a groove for pretty solid filmmaking (I still have my concerns on earful suitability though) #BTATER18
Great tussle #tussle #BTATER18
Billy Lee has this situation under control quickly and effectively. #BTATER18
It seems Quentin Tarantino may have watched this film before making OUATIH. #BTATER18
That's the only explanation #BTATER18
This is going to end with Billy Lee getting felled by the spoiled sandwich we saw in Act One. #BTATER18
Never seen a motel with such intense Nevada vibes #BTATER18

Damn, really thought Dakota Johnson had plot armor here

That's classic roulette baby #BTATER18
Drink of the ep is red star Kentucky Straight Bourbon. #DrinkOfTheEp #BTATER18
Could use a lot more detail about the process of monetarizing a sex tape from a notable dead guy #BTATER18
Now that the power's out, it's a good thing they lit all those fires. That's thinking ahead! #BTATER18
Fire pits keep delivering and delivering #BTATER18
Miles flashback time! At last. #BTATER18
I stand corrected: we have not yet revealed all the mysteries of the El Royale (until now) #MilesThaKiller #BTATER18
Miles the absolute crack shot, never in doubt. #BTATER18
Wow, Miles in danger of dying directly on a state line, makes for a very complicated probate #BTATER18
Miles may outlive them all yet. #BTATER18
I expect smoke inhalation is starting to potentially become a problem here. #BTATER18
(Was already typing) Incredibly ventilation at The El Royale, amazing nobody's suffering from smoke inhalation yet #BTATER18
Oh thank heavens they did the right thing with the tape and no senators will be harmed. #BTATER18
Finally! Reno! #BTATER18
Wow, that actually was Nick Offerman at the start of the film. I thought it was just a Nick Offerman-looking guy. #BTATER18

Overall, a fun, beautiful film with a great sense of place. Perhaps a little longer than it needed to be. Probably too much repetition and not enough detail for an Earful film, except for the early check-in sequence. #BTATER18

There's a lot to like here; specifically from an Earful perspective, a good deal of logistics, strategy, etc

But it's also very, very languid (you might just say *slow*), the puzzly/disguised information nature is hard to analyze sequentially, and frankly SUBTEXT/THEMES a little too easily given
There's *something* interesting about a 1990s QT-style puzzle film being made several decades later, but I'm also just not sure this speaks to 2018 much at all
